repo.description: Kokkos-based High-Accuracy Relativistic Magnetohydrodynamics with AMR

terms.context_snippet: KHARMA is an implementation of the HARM scheme for general relativistic magnetohydrodynamics (GRMHD) in C++. It is based on the Parthenon AMR framework, using Kokkos for parallelism and GPU support. It is composed of modular "packages," which in theory make it easy to add or swa…
